data.body:
## Done Definitions (lightweight preplanning)

- When this epic is complete, ast-grep installation instructions appear in README.md and /dso:project-setup skill, with platform-specific commands for macOS (brew) and Linux (cargo)
  ← Satisfies: "ast-grep is documented as a recommended dependency"
- When this epic is complete, CLAUDE.md contains sg as the preferred structural code search tool with at least 2 concrete example patterns (bash source chain, cross-file pattern match)
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md references sg as the preferred tool"
- When this epic is complete, implementation-plan Step 3, fix-bug Step 2, sprint Phase 3, and brainstorm Phase 2 Step 2.5 each contain ast-grep guidance with a command -v sg guard and Grep fallback
  ← Satisfies: "Skills reference ast-grep in specific dependency discovery steps"
- When this epic is complete, running any of the 4 updated skills on a system without ast-grep installed produces no errors and falls back to Grep-based search
  ← Satisfies: "Graceful degradation"
- When this epic is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Scope
- IN: README, CLAUDE.md, project-setup skill, 4 exploration-heavy skills (implementation-plan, fix-bug, sprint, brainstorm), graceful degradation
- OUT: Wrapper scripts, deep integration into gates/hooks, ast-grep pattern config files (those belong in 1a5b-35f9 centrality epic)

## Considerations
- [Reliability] ast-grep is an external binary — graceful degradation must be tested on systems without it
- [Maintainability] 7 files reference ast-grep; changes to sg CLI syntax require coordinated updates
- [Testing] Agent adoption validated by transcript review, not automated test
